source_name: AEMO NEM regional wholesale price (RRP), monthly mean
notes: Programmatic AEMO NEM fetcher registered; awaiting first successful CI run after upstream rate-limit window. The fetcher pulls 5-minute TRADE intervals across NSW1, VIC1, QLD1, SA1 and TAS1 from the AEMO public price/demand archive and aggregates to monthly means.
source_rights: AEMO terms of use for tabular data
citation: Australian Energy Market Operator, NEM Price and Demand monthly archives.
